windows.changelog:
Fincept Terminal v4.0.0 — Full rewrite in C++20 + Qt6. Native performance, embedded Python analytics, 50+ screens, MCP AI integration, and multi-broker trading.

See https://github.com/Fincept-Corporation/FinceptTerminal/releases/latest for full release notes.
